frame_analyses.description: Initial setup, instruments not yet in view.
Instruments enter view and begin needle loading.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument positioning for needle loading.

frame_analyses.description: Needle beginning to pierce through the Penrose drain mark 1.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry appears slightly off-center on the mark.

frame_analyses.description: Needle exits through mark 2, suture being pulled through.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good angle of exit, slight deviation noted.

frame_analyses.description: Beginning the first throw, forming initial loop.
Completion of the first throw and starting the second throw.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Second hand position switching visible, effective technique.

frame_analyses.description: Starting the third throw and final knot securement.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Effective hand switching observed, third throw being tightened.
Both ends of the suture are cut, indicating task end.

knot_assessments.notes: Switches hands appropriately for added security.
Final throw executed correctly with hand switch.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: The slit is fully closed, indicating proper tension.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated effective suture placement and knot tying. All throws were completed securely with appropriate hand switching. Minimal deviations in suture placement were observed.
improvement_suggestions: Practice to reduce minor suture placement deviations.
Enhance speed while maintaining precision to lower task completion time.
strengths: Correctly executed surgeon's knot and successive throws.
Effective hand switching and instrument handling.
